title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates how Claude Code was used to build a revenue-generating product ($481k annually) from zero coding experience in 45 days. The video walks through five steps: problem-first shipping, knowing where to engineer vs. outsource, learning technical vocabulary, methodical development, and anticipating failure points.
